Class ProxyServlet

java.lang.Object

              org.vorpal.blade.services.loadbalancer.proxy.ProxyServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable, java.util.EventListener, javax.servlet.Servlet, javax.servlet.ServletConfig, javax.servlet.ServletContextListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipServletListener, javax.servlet.sip.TimerListener, ProxyListener

public abstract class ProxyServlet
extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
implements ProxyListener
